commit.message:
Add Stripe payment verification fallback on success page

If the webhook hasn't processed the order by the time the buyer lands
on the success page, the page now verifies payment directly with Stripe
and completes the order inline — generating tickets, updating the order
status, and sending the confirmation email. This makes ticket delivery
resilient to webhook delays or misconfiguration.

commit.message:
fix: Open stairway corridor — connect all office rooms

Rows 8-10 were ALL blocked, splitting the office into two disconnected
zones. Upper floor (patio/lounge/pantry) had 37 reachable tiles.
Lower floor (workspace/meeting) had 146. Agents could never cross.

Fix: opened walkable corridor through rows 6-11 (cols 6-11) matching
the visible stairway in office_bg.webp. Also opened patio, pantry,
and lounge floor tiles that were incorrectly blocked.

Result: 350 walkable tiles, ALL in a single connected region.
Agents can now walk between every room in the office.

commit.message:
Extract buildHumanoid helper to deduplicate unit mesh builders

Replace 7 near-identical humanoid mesh builder methods with a shared
buildHumanoid(config) helper that takes color, body dimensions, head
radius, and optional extras callback. Reduces ~77 lines of repetitive
box+head construction. Scout kept separate (cylinder body). Ogryn and
Techmarine use extras callback for shield arm and servo arm.

feat(config): add Terraform for GitHub repository management (#84)

* feat(config): add Terraform for GitHub repository management

Set up Terraform to manage GitHub repository settings with Infrastructure as Code:

- Add Terraform 1.14.7 to mise tools for version management
- Create infra/github directory with Terraform configuration
- Configure GitHub provider with CLI authentication (gh auth)
- Define repository settings optimized for trunk-based development (ADR-0018)
- Configure branch protection for main branch:
  - Require 1 PR approval
  - Require conversation resolution
  - Dismiss stale reviews on new commits
  - Require branches to be up to date (strict mode)
  - Prevent force pushes and deletions
- Enable auto-merge and delete branches after merge
- Import existing repository to Terraform state

Trunk-based development configuration based on ADR-0018 requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(config): add Terraform for GitHub repository management

Set up Terraform to manage GitHub repository settings with Infrastructure as Code,
optimized for single-developer workflow and trunk-based development.

Infrastructure Setup:
- Add Terraform 1.14.7 to mise tools for version management
- Create infra/github directory with Terraform configuration
- Configure GitHub provider with CLI authentication (gh auth)
- Import existing repository to Terraform state

Repository Settings (optimized for single-developer):
- Enable auto-merge for PRs after checks pass
- Enable automatic branch deletion after merge
- Squash merge only (keeps main history clean: 1 PR = 1 commit)
- Enable vulnerability alerts
- Disable wiki

Branch Protection (main branch):
- Require branches to be up to date before merging (strict mode)
- Prevent force pushes (maintains immutable history)
- Prevent branch deletions (protects main branch)
- No approval required (single-developer: self-approval not possible)
- No conversation resolution required (single-developer optimization)
- No admin enforcement (allows flexibility for emergency fixes)
- Signed commits disabled (GPG overhead not justified)

Documentation:
- Add ADR-0019: GitHub Repository Security Settings
- Document security rationale for single-developer team
- Explain trade-offs and optimization decisions
- Update ADR index with new decision record

Settings align with ADR-0018 (Trunk-Based Development) while optimizing for
single-developer workflow. CI/CD status checks will be added in future update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(config): enhance GitHub security and automation

Add Dependabot for automated dependency updates, enable secret
scanning with push protection, enforce linear history on main
branch, and manage existing repository labels via Terraform.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add open entry flag to timeslots — allow ticket purchases after start time

Adds an `open_entry` boolean to `event_time_slots` so museums can mark
slots (e.g. exhibitions) where visitors may arrive any time during the
window, not just before the start time. The checkout API now blocks only
when the slot has fully ended (or started on a non-open-entry slot).
Public event page shows contextual labels: Ended, In Progress, or spots
remaining.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(260320-kr8): evening digest period starts from last morning digest end

- After _compute_period, query last morning digest's period_end for
  evening digests and use max(period_start, last_morning_end)
- Prevents content overlap between morning (19:00-09:00) and evening
  (09:00-19:00) digests -- evening now starts where morning left off
- Add structured logging for period adjustment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Fall back to "noDigestsWaiting" when schedule exists but label is empty
- Add i18n keys: home.noDigestsAddSources (en/ru)

   direkt an statt einen API-Call fuer Bildgenerierung zu machen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: UE creation — RBAC permissions + complete UERANSIM config YAML

RBAC fix:
- Added create/delete to deployments and statefulsets (needed to create
  and remove dynamic UE pods)
- Added create/delete/patch/update to configmaps (needed for UE config)
- Root cause: API was getting HTTP 403 from K8s API → caught as
  'HTTP request failed' 500 error in the UI

UE YAML fix:
- Generated ue.yaml was missing mandatory UERANSIM fields, causing pod
  to crash on startup (Error/CrashLoopBackOff)
- Now matches the working ueransim-config template exactly:
  gnbSearchList, uacAic, uacAcc, sessions, configured-nssai,
  default-nssai, integrity, ciphering, integrityMaxRate
- opType set to 'OPC' (was missing, defaulted incorrectly)
- amf defaults to '8000' (correct Open5GS value, was 'c3d4')
- Respects sst/sd from request body for slice config

Verified: created UE pod reaches 1/1 Running in ~10s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add structured logging for connection, dialog fetch count, and

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 5400+ lines of new content across all 45 jobs + fix daily automation

## What changed:
- Fix GitHub Actions workflow (403 error): Added `permissions: contents: write`
- Added 10+ new MCQs to every job's 02_mcqs.md (job-specific questions)
- Added 20 Quick Revision One-Liners to every job's 01_study_material.md
- Expanded daily-content.js: 214 history dates (was 35), 120+ GK questions (was 60),
  50 tips (was 30), 35 current affairs (was 15), 60 words (was 30)
- Zero content removed — all changes are purely additive

## Why automation failed:
- GitHub Actions `daily-update.yml` returned 403 on checkout
- Root cause: Missing `permissions: contents: write` in workflow YAML
- Fix: Added permissions block + explicit token for checkout

commit.message:
fix: codex review 5 轮缺陷修复 — 模型归因精确化 + GUI 健康独立探活 + shfmt 格式化

- model_effective: session_id+agent_id 双维精确归因，拒绝 untagged 路由事件；
  dedup marker 仅在 emit 成功后写入；session agent marker 路径对齐 _common.sh
- model_fallback: agent_id 精确匹配，拒绝 untagged 路由事件（与 model_effective 一致）
- dispatch 协议: agent_id 升级为必填第 5 参数
- GUI httpOk: 独立 HTTP 探活 (5s fetch /api/info)，不再与 WS 绑定
- start-gui-server: 完整 projectRoot 路径校验（sanitized 比较）；
  check-health 僵尸进程自愈；旧版无 projectRoot 服务直接 reject
- statusLine 安装命令修正为 install-statusline-config.sh
- recovery config: 真实读取 autopilot.config.yaml（不再空分支）
- fixup 检测: anchor_sha..HEAD 范围扫描 + git log format 单引号修复
- shfmt 全量格式化 5 个脚本

commit.message:
Add Ingest module — AI data parser for knowledge ingestion

- Scan folders, parse files, extract knowledge chunks
- Supports: txt, md, json, csv, py, js, yaml, html, log, sh, go, etc.
- Smart chunking: JSON by keys, Markdown by headers, code by functions
- Domain-based organization (keep knowledge separated)
- Deduplication by content hash
- Search across all ingested knowledge
- Clear domains without touching core

Commands: ingest.scan, ingest.add, ingest.process, ingest.search,
ingest.stats, ingest.domains, ingest.clear

commit.message:
Fix VFXRenderer geometry leak on transient particle effects

Particles with one-off geometries (spell rings, flash spheres, supply pod
beams, command indicators) were only disposing their material on expiry,
leaking GPU geometry buffers. Add a disposeGeo flag to VFXParticle to
distinguish one-off geometries from shared ones (sphereGeo, boxGeo),
and dispose accordingly on cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
